title: Overworld Ancient Debris
description: Bring ancient debris to the overworld!
body:
**🧱 Overworld Ancient Debris**

Ever wished Ancient Debris wasn’t locked to the Nether?
Overworld Ancient Debris brings this legendary resource straight into the Overworld — carefully balanced.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🔥 Features**

Ancient Debris now generates in the Overworld

Spawns deep underground to keep it rare and rewarding

Uses vanilla-style world generation

Works with existing worlds (new chunks only)

No new blocks or items — pure vanilla compatibility

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![debris](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dbf3b8d261ebf433f794a8cc26f116f7832646e.png)

**🛠️ Compatibility**

Designed for Fabric / Forge (depending on your build)

Plays nicely with other world-gen mods

Safe to add or remove

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD

**Disclaimer about product: NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT**
